patches_applied.description: SEC-2b.7 endpoint removal paragraph: removed causal inference ('taken down shortly after this review'), added precise 13-hour timing window (18:12→07:14 UTC), added stronger analytical framing (anomalies were properties of live rules, not transient errors)

SEC-2b.7 W004 notation: replaced ambiguous namespace note (italicized in middle of sentence) with explicit disambiguation in the notation itself: 'W004 (the dome's internal API label for the 2024 Eclipse 9-Station Replication — corresponding to our WIN-025; not to be confused with wins-page WIN-004 which refers to Noise Floor Limit)'

SEC-6.5 opening: restored '0 Falsified' per human note HN-20260411T0907. Added explicit internal contradiction: dome summary says 0 Falsified, but W024 detail says FALSIFIED. Strengthened to show dome's own data contradicts its own headline.

SEC-6.6 cross-section inconsistency fixed: 'acknowledges at least 4 falsified predictions' → 'lists 4 predictions as failed — 1 Falsified (W024) and 3 labeled Refined (W019, W020, W027)'. Aligns 6.6 with 6.5's more precise categorization.

Verdict changes from curmudgeon PRED-batch-2026-04-11 review: W019 standard_physics→falsified, W020 unfalsifiable→falsified, PRED-NEW-002 unfalsifiable→standard_physics, PRED-091 standard_physics→recycled (restates_win=066). Prediction falsified count now 4 (up from 2).
